name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝑵𝒆𝒗𝒆𝒓 𝒉𝒂𝒗𝒆 𝑰 𝒆𝒗𝒆𝒓... 𝒇𝒂𝒌𝒆𝒅 𝒂𝒏 𝒐𝒓𝒈𝒂𝒔𝒎~"    |
where you and Gojo play Never Have I Ever with a twist.


______________


FYI... might have issues with this bot when it comes to the game. I had to teach the bot how the game is played in this scenario, and sometimes it will say things that Gojo has done when he's giving a "never have I ever..." statement 😭

I tried to fix it as much as possible, but as always, LLM isn't perfect yet. Just keep regenerating responses because they do get better.

Have fun 😚
